header.name: Kevin Homburg
header.title: Software tinkerer, city explorer, beer enthusiast

hero.intro: You probably saw me somewhere and that is how you ended up here. Feel free to message me or come say hi. I am always up for new connections, interesting conversations, and spontaneous plans.
hero.panel_text: Usually somewhere between building things on my laptop, roaming the city with friends, or going on spontaneous city trips
tags: big fan of art and old buildings

about.title: The short version
about.p1: Hi, I'm Kevin. I made this page because I like meeting new people, but when I am out on my own I far too often end up staring at my screen or forget to ask for contact details so we actually stay in touch. So this is an invitation: if you see me somewhere, come say hi or send me a message if you feel like having a conversation, staying in touch, or just saying hello.
about.p2: I like software, travel, good design, beer, architecture, art, good conversations, and anything that makes it fun to spend time together.

cards.title: I like making things feel alive
cards.text: Apps, interfaces, ideas, plans. If it can be shaped into something more interesting, I want to touch it.

cards.title: Friendly wins every time
cards.text: I'd rather create a warm first impression than a serious one. Real connection is more fun anyway.

cards.title: I collect places and stories
cards.text: Cities, little cafes, museums, unexpected detours. I usually have a recommendation or a question ready.

reasons.title: You should absolutely say hi if...
items: you saw me somewhere and want to turn that random moment into an actual conversation.
you have a travel tip, hidden spot, or museum recommendation I should know about.
you want to build something fun, weird, useful, or all three at once.
you just like people with warm energy and felt like following that instinct.

contact.title: Say hi the easy way
contact.intro: Send a line, a recommendation, a project idea, or a tiny message with excellent timing. I'm into all of it.
prompts: I saw you and wanted to say hi.
contact.message_placeholder: Anything from 'hi' to a surprisingly specific travel recommendation.
contact.contact_placeholder: Instagram, phone, email, carrier pigeon instructions...
contact.success_message: Message received. I'm looking forward to reading it.
contact.note: Short messages win. Genuine messages win harder.
contact.qr_title: Scan if typing feels too serious
contact.qr_text: The QR is here for maximum spontaneity and minimal friction.
contact.qr_caption: Use whichever route gets you to hello the fastest.
contact.availability_text: Even if I'm on a train, in a museum, or walking through a new city, I still get back to people.
